Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-8368 affecting package perl-libwww-perl for versions less than 6.83-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-8368 affecting package perl-libwww-perl for versions less than 6.83-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package perl-libwww-perl is earlier than 6.83-1, affected by CVE-2026-8368
